title: TIP Signal Interconnect $260K Overrun, Bridge New York Culvert, and SU Comstock Ductbank Permissions
summary: City Engineer Mary Robinson presents items 14-22. Items 14-16: North-south/east-west corridor signal interconnect phase 2 on James/S. Salina streets came in $260K over budget on rebid, bringing total to ~$4.6M with local share at 32% since no TIP money available. Items 17-19: East Calvin Street culvert replacement over Meadbrook ($1.476M, 100% Bridge New York reimbursement) needs amended language for potential cost overruns and 24-month schedule. Items 20-22: Three revocable permissions for Syracuse University residential halls at 501 Comstock, 505 Comstock, and 315 Waverly for underground ductbanks. Council questions annual fee structure ($1/linear foot since ~2000, tied to CPI), permanent revocable permission nature, and street cut permit process.
